description: United States Army general in WWI, WWII and Korea (1880–1964)
description_wiki: Douglas MacArthur (26 January 1880 – 5 April 1964) was an American general who served as a top commander during World War II and the Korean War, achieving the rank of General of the Army.

description: head of state and of government of the U.S. state of Georgia
description_wiki: The governor of Georgia is the head of government of Georgia and the commander-in-chief of the state's National Guard, when not in federal service, and State Defense Force.

description: American politician (1884–1946)

description: American politician (1903–1980)

aliases: Democratic Party of the United States
description: American political party
description_wiki: The Democratic Party is the major liberal political party in the United States, sitting on the center to center-left of the political spectrum.

description: discriminatory elections held in the Southern United States
description_wiki: White primaries were primary elections held in the Southern United States in which only white voters were permitted to participate if they paid their poll tax (of $1 to $2).

description: tax which is the same for every liable individual
description_wiki: A poll tax, also known as head tax or capitation, is a tax levied as a fixed sum on every liable individual (typically every adult), without reference to income or resources.
